languages.text: "Столько Призывов спустя... Присяга, как написано в Уставе! Наш полк обрел цель и вернулся к исполнению долга. Осталось лишь решить, Ваша Светлость, что теперь делать с Зарковым и нашим полком".

"So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Handbook! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."
languages.original_text: "Столько Призывов спустя... Присяга, как написано в Уставе! Наш полк обрел цель и вернулся к исполнению долга. Осталось лишь решить, Ваша Светлость, что теперь делать с Зарковым и нашим полком".

traits.locale_text: "So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Code! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

"So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Code! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

{n}The captain-quartermaster beams with pride and elation.{/n} "So many call-ups later... And once again the ancient oaths have been professed. Once again our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Lord Captain, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

"So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Code! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

"So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Code! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

languages.text: {n}艦長兼大尉は誇りと喜びに満ちた笑顔を見せる。「召集が繰り返され...そして再び古き誓いが繰り返された。我々の連隊は再び目的を見出し、任務に復帰した。残るは君が、艦長、ザルコフと我々の連隊の行く末をどう決めるかである」{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The captain-quartermaster beams with pride and elation.{/n} "So many call-ups later... And once again the ancient oaths have been professed. Once again our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Lord Captain, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

traits.locale_text: {n}艦長兼大尉は誇りと喜びに満ちた笑顔を見せる。「召集が繰り返され...そして再び古き誓いが繰り返された。我々の連隊は再び目的を見出し、任務に復帰した。残るは君が、艦長、ザルコフと我々の連隊の行く末をどう決めるかである。」{/n}

languages.text: « Après tant de Mobilisations... le voilà enfin : le serment, tel qu'il est écrit dans le Manuel ! Notre régiment a trouvé son but et repris du service. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à décider de ce qui doit advenir de Zarkov et de notre régiment, Votre Seigneurie. »
languages.original_text: "So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Handbook! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

traits.locale_text: « Après tant de Mobilisations... le voilà enfin : le serment, tel qu'il est écrit dans le Manuel ! Notre régiment a trouvé son but et repris du service. Il ne vous reste plus qu'à décider de ce qui doit advenir de Zarkov et de notre régiment, Votre Seigneurie. »

languages.text: "Onca Sevk Grubu'ndan sonra... İşte. El Kitabı'nda yazıldığı üzere yeminimiz! Alayımız amacını buldu, vazifesine döndü. Geriye sadece Zarkov ve alayımızla ne yapılacağına karar vermeniz kaldı {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."
languages.original_text: "So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Handbook! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

traits.locale_text: "Onca Sevk Grubu'ndan sonra... İşte. El Kitabı'nda yazıldığı üzere yeminimiz! Alayımız amacını buldu, vazifesine döndü. Geriye sadece Zarkov ve alayımızla ne yapılacağına karar vermeniz kaldı {mf|Lord|Leydi} Hazretleri."

languages.text: "So viele Einberufungen später ... Und hier ist er, der Eid, wie er im Kodex steht! Unser Regiment hat seine Bestimmung gefunden und erfüllt wieder seine Pflicht. Jetzt müsst Ihr nur noch entscheiden, was aus Zarkov und unserem Regiment werden soll, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}."
languages.original_text: "So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Handbook! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

traits.locale_text: "So viele Einberufungen später ... Und hier ist er, der Eid, wie er im Kodex steht! Unser Regiment hat seine Bestimmung gefunden und erfüllt wieder seine Pflicht. Jetzt müsst Ihr nur noch entscheiden, was aus Zarkov und unserem Regiment werden soll, Eure {mf|Lordschaft|Ladyschaft}.

languages.text: «Tantos llamados después... y, por fin, ¡los juramentos, tal como figuran en el manual! Nuestro regimiento ha vuelto a encontrar su propósito y ha regresado al servicio. Solo queda que decida qué hacer con Zarkov y con nuestro regimiento, mi{mf|lord|lady}».
languages.original_text: "So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Handbook! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

traits.locale_text: «Tantos llamados después... y, por fin, ¡los juramentos, tal como figuran en el manual! Nuestro regimiento ha vuelto a encontrar su propósito y ha regresado al servicio. Solo queda que decida qué hacer con Zarkov y con nuestro regimiento, mi{mf|lord|lady}».

languages.text: “历经这么多轮征召之后……它终于就在眼前：那份载于《手册》之中的誓约！我们的军团终于找到了自己的使命，回归了职责。接下来，只等您来决定扎尔科夫和我们军团的命运了，大人。”
languages.original_text: "So many Call-Ups later... And here it is: the oath, as written in the Handbook! Our regiment has found its purpose and returned to duty. All that remains is for you to decide, Your {mf|Lordship|Ladyship}, what to do with Zarkov and our regiment."

traits.locale_text: “历经这么多轮征召之后……它终于就在眼前：那份载于《手册》之中的誓约！我们的军团终于找到了自己的使命，回归了职责。接下来，只等您来决定扎尔科夫和我们军团的命运了，大人。”
